repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Historical planning publications, transferred from the Fine Arts Library.

defitem.label: Contact Information -
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax - (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http - //rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding -
defitem.item: Evan Fay Earle, May 2009, June 2010Daniel W. Young, August 2010Ryan Hicks, October 2010Tracy Wax, October 2010

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Historical planning publications, transferred from the Fine Arts Library, organized alphabetically by subject, outside of the subject "cities", the collection starts with the letter "H."

emph.ref: Series II. Highways - Finance, Law, Surveys, Traffic
Series IV. Hospitals and Hospital Districts
Series XI. Mobile Homes and Parks

prefercite.head: Cite As -
prefercite.p: Historical Planning publications collection, #15-3-3669. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
